commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 5:11 Sanctified; free from all legal impediments to offer sacrifice. (Haydock) Divided. Hebrew, "observed. "(Tirinus) Protestants, "and they did not then wait by course "which was the case also with the singers, on this solemn occasion; as the number regulated by David for each week, would not have been sufficient. (Haydock) The regulation had not yet been reduced to practice. (Menochius) (Calmet) As yet (Du Hamel) at that time, is omitted (Haydock) by the Septuagint (Du Hamel) and Hebrew.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
